author: Ye Yuan
abstract: Diagnose live ClickHouse cluster and query incidents from a checked-out, version-matched ClickHouse source tree. Triages the outside view (Prometheus: node up-ness, OOM, CPU/iowait, disk, network, bare-metal vs k8s) and the inside view (read-only queries against the cluster's own system.* tables: errors, query_log forensics and attribution, processes, parts/merges, replicas, thread-pool and FD exhaustion, settings), then confirms every root-cause claim against the matched source (error code to throw site, metric to semantics). Every probe is resource-capped so a debug query can never OOM-kill or stall a production node. Delegates the remedy stage to clickhouse-best-practices.
